name: detonate-file

outputs.description: File name (only if the report type is JSON) InfoFile.Type File type, for example "PE" (only if the report type is JSON)
outputs.name: InfoFile.Name

outputs.description: File size (only in case of report type=json) InfoFile.MD5 MD5 hash of the file (only if the report type is JSON)
outputs.name: InfoFile.Size

outputs.description: SHA-1 hash of the file (only if the report type is JSON) InfoFile.SHA256 SHA-256 hash of the file (only if the report type is JSON)
outputs.name: InfoFile.SHA1

outputs.description: For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision InfoFile.Malicious.Description For malicious files, the reason that the vendor made the decision
outputs.name: InfoFile.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested (only if the report type is JSON) DBotScore.Type The type of the indicator (only if the report type is JSON)
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score (only if the report type is JSON) DBotScore.Score The actual score (only if the report type is JSON)
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: The returned TaskId value in the submission step, previously returned value in the File/URL submission step ATD.Task.jobId The returned JobId value in the submission step, previously returned value in the File/URL submission step
outputs.name: ATD.Task.taskId

outputs.description: The task ID status (Completed or Analyzing) ATD.Task.messageId The message ID relevant to the uploaded sample
outputs.name: ATD.Task.status

outputs.description: The detonated URL ATD.Task.srcIp Source IPv4 address
outputs.name: ATD.Task.url

outputs.description: Destination IPv4 address ATD.Task.MD5 MD5 of the uploaded sample
outputs.name: ATD.Task.destIp

outputs.description: SHA-256 of the uploaded sample ATD.Task.SHA1 SHA-1 of the uploaded sample
outputs.name: ATD.Task.SHA256
